description: Project-specific catalog for launching and operating Yen May Vintage across 5 channels: Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Threads, and Google Maps. PDF is the brand source of truth; marketing plan is execution context; evaluation document is critique and risk-control context.
Lock the Yen May brand foundation from the PDF: gu tham my, warm neutrals, curated identity, audience, voice, visual rules, and non-negotiables.
Translate the marketing plan into channel pillars, keyword phases, recurring series, and a 12-week editorial direction.
Create the practical agency brief for the first shoot: 5-video order, shot list, prep checklist, tone references, keyword overlays, and 4-hour shoot structure.

Review agency-production-brief.md for social execution feasibility: platform fit, shot list clarity, posting workflow, cross-posting, agency handoff, and whether the brief prevents generic fashion-shop content.
Review agency-production-brief.md for buyer psychology and conversion: friction, proof, urgency, trust, CTA clarity, Vietnamese DM buyer path, foreign visitor path, and ethical scarcity.
Review and sharpen agency-production-brief.md hooks, CTAs, captions, overlays, DM prompts, and wording so the agency can execute clear conversion-focused content.
Optional hard review of agency-production-brief.md: identify failure modes, ambiguous instructions, missing responsibilities, execution risks, and ways the agency could misinterpret the brief.

Create the 5-channel launch calendar for Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, Threads, and Google Maps: posts, reels, hooks, captions, stories, highlights, maps updates, retention loops, and channel-specific CTAs.
Choose and brief avatar, cover photo, post templates, product visuals, story highlights, and image usage from the existing Yen May Store assets.
Write the Facebook bio, about section, CTA, intro post, DM quick replies, Google Maps description, TripAdvisor description, and KOL DM template.
Define KPIs and tracking routines for keyword rank, reach, saves, DM inquiries, follower growth, reviews, footfall, and boost thresholds.
Plan paid boosting only after organic validation: audience, budget, post selection criteria, radius targeting, and campaign guardrails.
Generate Meta ad copy and creative variations for posts that pass organic thresholds, especially Y2K Da Nang and hidden alley discovery angles.
